title: ChatCapitalizer
description: ✨ ChatCapitalizer: Automatically capitalizes the first letter of your chat messages and after punctuation, keeping player names untouched. A small QoL client-side mod for cleaner, more readable chat.
body:
# ChatCapitalizer ✨

_ChatCapitalizer is a lightweight client-side mod that improves chat readability in Minecraft.  
Every message you type is automatically formatted with a capitalized first letter, and proper capitalization after punctuation **(., ?, !, etc.)**._

---

## ✅ Features
- ✨ Automatically capitalizes the first letter of every message.
- 📝 Proper capitalization after punctuation (`.`, `?`, `!`, etc.).
- 👤 Player nicknames and excluded words are never modified.
- ⚙️ Fully configurable via **Cloth Config**:
  - Change or disable capitalization rules.
  - Define custom symbols that trigger capitalization.
  - Manage a list of words excluded from capitalization.
- 🎮 Config can be opened in two ways:
  - **With ModMenu** (if installed).
  - **With the default keybind `M`** (rebindable in Minecraft controls).
- ⚡ Lightweight and 100% client-side → works on any server, no server mod required.

---

## 🔧 Compatibility
- Loader: Fabric (also works with Quilt).  
- Client-side only → safe for multiplayer servers.  
- Supported versions: **1.20.1 → 1.21.8** (multi-version build).

---

## ⚙️ Library Required
- Cloth Config is required for the in-game configuration GUI.
---

## 📌 Notes
- The mod automatically respects your chosen settings from the config GUI.
- You can edit capitalization rules, symbols, and excluded words at any time.
